public_reputation: Folk-cunning hero said to have cheated three toll lords without ever technically breaking guest-right.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a tricksters still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tricksters in and around Nomdara Caravan, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Nomdara Caravan workable through the obligations of tricksters while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Nomdara Caravan, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of tricksters visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Pashko Many-Routes can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Pashko Many-Routes needs help with a problem in Nomdara Caravan that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Pashko Many-Routes can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Pashko Many-Routes carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara Caravan: the part of Nomdara Caravan where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
